description_long: This is a medium-sized, muscular dog with a short, smooth brindle coat and a white blaze running down its face and chest. The body is compact and athletic, with a broad chest, strong legs, and a straight, tapering tail. The head is blocky with a pronounced stop, and the ears are semi-erect, folding slightly at the tips. The eyes are dark and expressive, and the muzzle is short and square. The dog wears a simple, dark flat buckle collar around its neck. Its overall appearance suggests alertness, strength, and agility, making it well-suited for active urban environments.
description: A muscular, brindle-coated dog with a white facial blaze, semi-erect ears, and a flat buckle collar, exuding strength and alertness.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad chest, white blaze on the face, and symmetrical semi-erect ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the brindle coat pattern, straight tail, and athletic build.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the muscular hindquarters, straight tail, and back of the collar.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the brindle coat, strong legs, and facial profile.
